accessibility.text: If ￼ small enough, solutions exist for all ￼ and any time ￼
If ￼ small enough, solutions exist for all ￼ and any time ￼
And: convergence in law to mean-field limit as ￼ (￼ chaotic initial law)
If ￼ small enough, solutions exist for all ￼ and any time ￼
And: convergence in law to mean-field limit as ￼ (￼ chaotic initial law)
Via recent compactness method for Keller-Segel (Jourdain & Fournier, Ann. Appl. Prob., 2017) (see dW, thesis, 2025)
Compare with moderate, cut-off interactions and entropy solutions (for review see Chaintron & Diez, Kinet. Rel. Models, 2022)
